name: East Coast Furnitech Public Company Limited
summary: East Coast Furnitech Public Company Limited manufactures and sells self-assembled furniture in Thailand. The company manufactures, trades in, and distributes furniture made of particleboard and rubber wood under the ELEGA, Finna House, a7, Hasta, Costa, My Fur, VV D√É¬©cor, FREELAX, and Leaf brand names, as well as dried rubber wood. It also manufactures and distributes foil paper, which is used in coating the particleboard and sawn timber, as well as offers edge-cutting service of (PVC) to be used in furniture assembly. The company distributes its furniture through showroom, wholesale shops, and retail shops, as well sells furniture online. In addition, it operates biomass and solar power plants. The company also exports its products to Japan, the United States, the Middle East, China, India, Malaysia, the Philippines, and other countries. East Coast Furnitech Public Company Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Rayong, Thailand.
